subject: [AAI-SDC-DIST] Updgrade AAI to use kafka native
commit_message:
[AAI-SDC-DIST] Updgrade AAI to use kafka native

Update AAI to use new sdc-dist client
Add AAI KafkaUser for SDC topic auth

Signed-off-by: david.mcweeney <david.mcweeney@est.tech>
Change-Id: I842b9dc33c9bff94a81fef3990e1b66c5984e0d1
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1815
